nasb.text: Then the soldiers of the governor took Jesus into the Praetorium and gathered the whole Roman cohort around Him.

esv.text: Then the soldiers of the governor took Jesus into the governor’s headquarters, and they gathered the whole battalion before him.

cnv.text: 總督的士兵把耶穌帶到總督府，召集全隊士兵到他面前。

ccb.text: 士兵把耶稣押进总督府，叫全营的士兵都聚集在祂周围。

csbs.text: 那时，总督的士兵们把耶稣带进总督府，召集了全队士兵在他周围。
